name: Drake Baldwin
headline: Baldwin went 2-for-4 with a walk, a triple, a home run and four RBI in Monday's Grapefruit League game against the Rays.

name: Vladimir Guerrero Jr.
headline: Guerrero went 2-for-4 with an RBI in Thursday's Grapefruit League game against the Yankees.

name: Gleyber Torres
headline: Torres (groin) has been cleared to participate in all baseball activities, Evan Petzold of the Detroit Free Press reports.

name: Austin Riley
headline: Riley could be surprisingly active as a base stealer this season under the tutelage of new Atlanta baserunning coach Antoan Richardson, Mark Bowman of MLB.com reports.

name: Zachary Neto
headline: Neto was removed from Friday's Cactus League game against the White Sox after being hit by a pitch, but he is OK, Rhett Bollinger of MLB.com reports.

name: James Wood
headline: Wood went 0-for-2 with a walk in Friday's 12-8 loss to the Mets.

name: Jo Adell
headline: Adell went 2-for-4 with an RBI and a run scored in Thursday's Cactus League win over the Brewers.

name: Jac Caglianone
headline: Caglianone started at DH and went 0-for-3 with two strikeouts in Tuesday's Cactus League win over the Dodgers.

name: Kazuma Okamoto
headline: Okamoto will start the 2026 season in the Minors, Scott Mitchell of TSN.ca reports.

name: Jackson Chourio
headline: Chourio went 2-for-3 with a two-run home run in Wednesday's Cactus League game against the Rangers.

name: Shohei Ohtani
headline: Ohtani went 1-for-3 with a walk and a run scored in Thursday's Cactus League game against the Padres.

name: Corbin Burnes
headline: Burnes allowed two runs (one earned) on five hits and a walk while striking out five over five innings Monday in a Cactus League win over the Royals.

name: Eury Perez
headline: Perez had a 'significant setback' during a recent throwing session while working back from a shoulder injury, Christina De Nicola of MLB.com reports.

name: Nick Lodolo
headline: Lodolo was optioned to Triple-A Louisville on Thursday, Bobby Nightengale of the Cincinnati Enquirer reports.

name: Drew Rasmussen
headline: Rasmussen completed his first bullpen session Thursday since being shut down with right elbow discomfort earlier this month.

name: Eli Willits
headline: Willits went 3-for-4 with a walk, a run scored, two RBI and a stolen base for Single-A Fredericksburg on Thursday.

name: Charlie Condon
headline: The Rockies reassigned Condon to minor-league camp Thursday.

name: Max Clark
headline: Clark was reassigned to minor-league camp Monday.

name: Tanner Bibee
headline: The Guardians named Bibee as their starter for Opening Day against the Mariners on Thursday.

name: MacKenzie Gore
headline: Gore allowed two hits and three walks while striking out three over 4.1 scoreless innings Monday in a 3-2 win over the White Sox.

name: Matthew Liberatore
headline: The Cardinals announced Wednesday that Liberatore will start the team's March 26 season opener against the Rays.

name: Shane McClanahan
headline: McClanahan threw a bullpen session Sunday and came out fine.

name: Gavin Williams
headline: Williams threw three innings Wednesday in a minor-league game, allowing one hit while striking out four.

name: Spencer Strider
headline: Strider (elbow) threw a bullpen session Wednesday and came out healthy.

name: Nolan McLean
headline: McLean allowed one run on one hit and three walks over three innings Monday in a Cactus League start against the Royals.

name: Tatsuya Imai
headline: Imai struck out five and allowed one hit and one walk across 3.1 scoreless innings in his latest Cactus League start Saturday.

name: Noah Cameron
headline: Cameron will break camp as a member of the Reds' rotation.

name: Shane Smith
headline: Smith will break camp as a member of the Royals' bullpen.

name: Jacob Misiorowski
headline: Misiorowski struck out three and allowed two hits and a walk over three scoreless innings in Tuesday's Cactus League start.

name: Braxton Ashcraft
headline: Ashcraft struck out five over five scoreless innings Sunday in a Grapefruit League start.
